executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned freshness/signoff drift was repaired this run; end-to-end green remains blocked by the marketing-owned runner degradation and primary-repo adoption measurement window.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Keep architecture at qualified pass, but force the marketing owner loop to clear the runner-bundle degradation path and earn fresh outcome movement before any full-green certification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop is the live blocker: runner bundle degraded and certification still fails closed
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_runner_latest.json is currently ok=false because reddit_monitor.py returned search_provider_degraded, and the marketing independent verifier still reports unresolved blockers for runner health and primary-repo adoption.
findings.root_cause: The architecture loop is not the blocker anymore; the remaining red state is inside the marketing owner loop.
findings.recommended_fix: Localize remediation to the marketing owner loop: either restore the runner bundle to healthy status or explicitly downgrade the blocked Reddit-search path to a non-blocking watch state, then keep certification closed until Codeberg movement or tactic replacement is proven.

findings.title: Architecture verifier still requires strict rerun ordering after any architecture artifact refresh
findings.mechanism: A newer architecture_latest.json/md or peer artifact invalidates stale independent signoff until the independent verifier and verifier are rerun in sequence.
findings.root_cause: Fail-closed freshness gating is correct, but the refresh sequence must end with fresh independent verification plus verifier execution.
findings.recommended_fix: Whenever architecture_latest.* changes materially, immediately rerun agent_architecture_independent_verify.py and then agent_architecture_verifier.py before treating runtime health as green.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history still exists but is not live-topology drift
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains disabled historical entries while openclaw cron list --json reports 20 live enabled jobs and 0 live disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep reporting persisted disabled history separately from the live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture signoff coherent after refreshes
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The stale architecture verifier incident was local and repairable, and it should not keep reappearing after artifact refreshes.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture-owned runtime checks stay green once fresh independent verification and verifier reruns complete.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Clear the marketing runner degradation and then remeasure real outcome movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The remaining live blockers are marketing-owned, specifically runner bundle health plus flat primary-repo adoption.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Marketing can move from structural red to a clean measurement window, with a fresh independent pass only after both runner health and adoption evidence improve.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Rechecked live cron, health monitor, loop integrity, and marketing-owned blocker artifacts before refreshing the architecture report.
Updated the architecture audit artifacts to the current live blocker set: marketing runner degradation plus primary-repo adoption measurement pending.
Reran agent_architecture_independent_verify.py against the refreshed architecture artifacts and current live runtime evidence.
Reran agent_architecture_verifier.py and restored pass status after the fresh independent verification.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass after the runner bundle is healthy again and primary-repo adoption moves or the tactic is replaced.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing owner loop is still red on runner health and outcome movement
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: reddit_monitor.py degraded the runner bundle and Codeberg adoption is still flat, so marketing remains the only domain blocking full-green certification.

architecture_verifier_errors: health monitor reports non-architecture live issues: marketing-daily:timeout

errors: health monitor reports non-architecture live issues: marketing-daily:timeout
